creator: harlan@everett.org
text:
If dovecot and dovecot-antispam are installed and if dovecot
	is upgraded to a new version, tools like portmaster do not know
	that dovecot-antispam must be re-installed.

	If dovecot is upgraded and dovecot-antispam is not, dovecot will
	fail to run because the code will cause an abort because of the
	mismatch between the two packages.

How-To-Repeat: 	Install a slightly older dovecot and dovecot-antispam.
	Upgrade mail/dovecot.
	run portmaster -a, and notice that dovecot has been upgraded but
	dovecot-antispam has not.
	restart dovecot, give it a go, and watch it fail because
	dovecot-antispam was compiled against an earlier version of dovecot.
